title: WI RPC
description: WI RPC is a simple mod that coded to create custom discord rpc
body:
WI RPC

WI RPC is a simple mod that coded to create custom discord rpc

CONFIG

{ "ClientId": "", "DisplayUsername": true, "DisplayLargeImage": true, "LargeImageID": "101", "LargeImageText": "Large Image", "DisplaySmallImage": true, "SmallImageID": "101", "SmallImageText": "Small Image" }

How to create rpc?

  • go here
  • create new application
  • copy client id
  • upload all images that you whant to display in rpc

  • after setup mod config
